description: Schema for the supplemental per-claim extraction that decomposed each case into constituent legal claims. Applied via Claude Haiku 4.5 Batch API at temperature 0.1.

case_level_fields.counsel_named: string — name of counsel if represented
case_level_fields.defendant_type: PRIVATE_LANDLORD | PROPERTY_MANAGEMENT | HOA_CONDO_ASSN | HOUSING_AUTHORITY | DEVELOPER | MUNICIPALITY | OTHER
case_level_fields.disability_category: MENTAL_HEALTH | SUBSTANCE_USE | MOBILITY | SENSORY | INTELLECTUAL_DEVELOPMENTAL | MULTIPLE_UNSPECIFIED | OTHER
case_level_fields.housing_type: PRIVATE_MARKET | PUBLIC_HOUSING | SECTION_8_VOUCHER | SECTION_8_PBV | LIHTC | SECTION_811 | SECTION_202 | SUPPORTIVE_HOUSING | OTHER_SUBSIDIZED | HOA_CONDO | MANUFACTURED_HOUSING | UNDETERMINED

claims_array.description: Array of claim-level objects, one per distinct FHA claim. Non-FHA claims collapsed into single object per case.

claim_fields.legal_theory: REASONABLE_ACCOMMODATION | DISPARATE_TREATMENT | DISPARATE_IMPACT | RETALIATION | DESIGN_AND_CONSTRUCTION | INTERFERENCE_COERCION | NOT_FHA | UNCLEAR
claim_fields.accommodation_type: For RA claims only, same categories as pipeline classification

merits_reached_classification_rule.motion_to_dismiss: Iqbal/Twombly and nexus-failure dismissals → merits_reached=NO (pleading sufficiency, not substantive standard)
merits_reached_classification_rule.summary_judgment_or_trial: All outcomes → merits_reached=YES (evidentiary record evaluated against substantive elements)
